creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 165927
vucml entry for latest chromium vulnerabilities

http://googlechromereleases.blogspot.de/2016/01/stable-channel-update_20.html

The latest release of chromium fixes 37 vulnerabilities (at least).
Attached is a vuxml entry, ready for insertion (fragment, not patch).

Update of the chromium port itself is in-prgress (build takes some time)
